payload.title: Phase value can escape the Flatline output directory
payload.details: The new final_consensus_path builds a filesystem path with the raw phase string: `${output_dir}/${phase}-final_consensus.json`. invalidate_final_consensus then runs `rm -f` on that derived path, and aggregate publication later writes to it. If phase is user-controlled or can be influenced by a caller, a value containing `../` can delete or overwrite files outside the intended Flatline evidence directory, limited only by the fixed `-final_consensus.json` suffix. Constrain phase to the known enum values before path construction, or resolve the target path and verify it remains under flatline_output_dir.
